perturbation.original_text: For a period of eighteen months from the date of this Agreement, Investor will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, directly or indirectly, solicit for purposes of employment, offer to hire or offer to enter into any contract with any executive officer of the Company with whom Investor has contact, or of whom Investor otherwise becomes aware, during its discussions with the Company or its evaluation of a possible Transaction; provided, however, that this paragraph shall not prohibit Investor from engagement in any general advertising or general solicitation not targeted to the Company’s employees; and provided, further, that Investor shall not be prohibited from soliciting or hiring any such employee whose employment has been terminated by the Company or its affiliates.
perturbation.changed_text: For a period of eighteen months from the date of this Agreement, Investor will not, without the Company’s prior written consent, directly or indirectly, solicit for purposes of employment, offer to hire or offer to enter into any contract with any employee of the Company with whom Investor has contact, or of whom Investor otherwise becomes aware, during its discussions with the Company or its evaluation of a possible Transaction; provided, however, that this paragraph shall not prohibit Investor from engagement in any general advertising or general solicitation not targeted to the Company’s employees; and provided, further, that Investor shall not be prohibited from soliciting or hiring any such employee whose employment has been terminated by the Company or its affiliates.
perturbation.explanation: The change from "executive officer" to "employee" broadens the scope of the non-solicitation clause in Section 7. This creates an in-text contradiction because other sections of the contract may allow contact with non-executive employees, while this modified clause restricts soliciting or contracting with *any* employee, creating uncertainty and potential legal disputes over permissible contact.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Neither Investor nor any of its Representatives shall knowingly contact any employee (other than the officers of the Company and other employees designated by such officers in the manner contemplated by this Agreement), supplier or customer of the Company regarding the Transaction or the Company’s prospects, without the Company’s prior written consent.
perturbation.justification: The original text restricts solicitation of "executive officers." The changed text broadens this to *any* "employee." The 'Contradicted Text' allows contact with non-officer employees. Therefore, the changed text now prohibits something (solicitation of any employee) that the 'Contradicted Text' allows (contact with non-officer employees), creating a direct contradiction. The perturbation explanation provided aligns with this assessment, highlighting the potential for legal disputes over permissible contact because of the expanded scope.

perturbation.original_text: Investor acknowledges that it is aware, and that it will advise its Representatives who receive the Evaluation Material, that the United States securities laws prohibit any person who has received from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer (and options, warrants and rights relating thereto) or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.changed_text: Investor acknowledges that it is aware, and that it will advise only some of its Representatives who receive the Evaluation Material, that the United States securities laws prohibit any person who has received from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer (and options, warrants and rights relating thereto) or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'all of its Representatives' to 'only some of its Representatives' in Section 9 regarding securities laws, we introduce a significant in-text contradiction with the responsibilities outlined in Section 2. Section 2 states 'Investor shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives,' which implies that all representatives are bound by the terms, including the securities law awareness. This creates confusion about whether investor is responsible for all representatives or just those that were advised about securities laws.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Evaluation Material will be used by Investor solely in connection with its evaluation of a possible Transaction, and not for any other purpose whatsoever. The Evaluation Material will be kept confidential by Investor in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and will not be disclosed to any person, except that Investor may disclose the Evaluation Material or portions thereof to those of its employees, officers, directors, partners, members, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, agents, consultants and advisors (these persons being collectively called “ Representatives ”) who (a) need to know such information in order for Investor to be able to evaluate a possible Transaction and (b) have been directed by Investor to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with the terms of this Agreement. For the avoidance of doubt, the term “Representatives” as applied to Investor shall not include any potential principal, co-investor or source of equity financing that is not a party to this Agreement. Investor shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives. Neither Investor nor any of its Representatives shall, directly or indirectly, (x) market or use (other than as permitted by the Agreement) any Evaluation Material, (y) reproduce or otherwise copy any Evaluation Material except in connection with the Transaction, or (z) disclose, sell, license, offer to sell or license or otherwise transfer or make available any Evaluation Material to any person other than as otherwise permitted by this Agreement. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, Investor will use all reasonable efforts to protect the confidentiality of Evaluation Material, including, without limitation, efforts commensurate with those it employs for the protection of its own confidential and proprietary information. The term “person” as used in this Agreement will be interpreted broadly to include, without limitation, any agency, corporation, individual, partnership, limited liability company, joint venture or other entity.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies Section 9 from requiring the investor to advise *all* representatives about securities laws, to advising *only some* representatives. This contradicts Section 2, which states, 'Investor shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives'. If only some representatives are advised, and any representative breaches the agreement, this creates a direct contradiction because the investor's responsibility extends to all representatives, regardless of whether they were informed about the securities laws or not. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: Investor acknowledges and agrees that nothing contained in this Agreement will be construed as granting any rights, by license or otherwise, to Investor or any of its Representatives to any Evaluation Material, or to any copyrights, trademarks, service marks, patent rights, trade secrets, or other proprietary rights of the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: Investor acknowledges and agrees that nothing contained in this Agreement will be construed as granting any rights, by license or otherwise, to Investor or some of its Representatives to any Evaluation Material, or to any copyrights, trademarks, service marks, patent rights, trade secrets, or other proprietary rights of the Company.
perturbation.explanation: The modification to Section 11 creates an in-text contradiction regarding the rights of Investor's representatives. By stating 'some of its Representatives', it introduces uncertainty whether this clause is applicable to all representatives, which is in direct violation with Section 2, which states that all representatives must follow this Agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Evaluation Material will be used by Investor solely in connection with its evaluation of a possible Transaction, and not for any other purpose whatsoever. The Evaluation Material will be kept confidential by Investor in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and will not be disclosed to any person, except that Investor may disclose the Evaluation Material or portions thereof to those of its employees, officers, directors, partners, members, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, agents, consultants and advisors (these persons being collectively called “ Representatives ”) who (a) need to know such information in order for Investor to be able to evaluate a possible Transaction and (b) have been directed by Investor to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with the terms of this Agreement. For the avoidance of doubt, the term “Representatives” as applied to Investor shall not include any potential principal, co-investor or source of equity financing that is not a party to this Agreement. Investor shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives. Neither Investor nor any of its Representatives shall, directly or indirectly, (x) market or use (other than as permitted by the Agreement) any Evaluation Material, (y) reproduce or otherwise copy any Evaluation Material except in connection with the Transaction, or (z) disclose, sell, license, offer to sell or license or otherwise transfer or make available any Evaluation Material to any person other than as otherwise permitted by this Agreement. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, Investor will use all reasonable efforts to protect the confidentiality of Evaluation Material, including, without limitation, efforts commensurate with those it employs for the protection of its own confidential and proprietary information. The term “person” as used in this Agreement will be interpreted broadly to include, without limitation, any agency, corporation, individual, partnership, limited liability company, joint venture or other entity.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces the phrase 'some of its Representatives' which directly contradicts the contradicted text. The contradicted text states 'Investor shall be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives' and that 'Representatives' must treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with the terms of this Agreement. By limiting the original text to 'some of its Representatives' the change implies that the investor is only responsible for some breaches by representatives or that only some representatives need to abide by this agreement, creating a contradiction to the original terms of the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: Equitable Remedies . Investor hereby agrees that a failure to comply with any provision of this Agreement would cause the Company irreparable harm and that monetary damages would be an inadequate remedy for an actual or threatened breach of this Agreement by Investor or any of its Representatives because of the difficulty of ascertaining the amount of damage that will be suffered by the Company in the event that this Agreement is breached. Accordingly, the Company will be entitled to specific performance of this Agreement and injunctive or other equitable relief as a remedy for any such breach without proof of actual damages. Investor further agrees to waive, and to use its reasonable efforts to cause its Representatives to waive, any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond in connection with any such remedy. Any such equitable remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for a breach of this Agreement, but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: Equitable Remedies . Investor hereby agrees that a failure to comply with any provision of this Agreement would cause the Company irreparable harm and that monetary damages would be an adequate remedy for an actual or threatened breach of this Agreement by Investor or any of its Representatives because of the difficulty of ascertaining the amount of damage that will be suffered by the Company in the event that this Agreement is breached. Accordingly, the Company will be entitled to monetary damages only as a remedy for any such breach with proof of actual damages. Investor further agrees to waive, and to use its reasonable efforts to cause its Representatives to waive, any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond in connection with any such remedy. Any such equitable remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for a breach of this Agreement, but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.explanation: The change in Section 14, stating that 'monetary damages would be an adequate remedy' and 'the Company will be entitled to monetary damages only' directly contradicts the original text, which states that monetary damages would be 'inadequate' and the Company is entitled to 'specific performance' and 'injunctive or other equitable relief'. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding the remedies available to the Company in case of a breach, introducing legal uncertainty and potentially limiting the Company's recourse.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Equitable Remedies . Investor hereby agrees that a failure to comply with any provision of this Agreement would cause the Company irreparable harm and that monetary damages would be an adequate remedy for an actual or threatened breach of this Agreement by Investor or any of its Representatives because of the difficulty of ascertaining the amount of damage that will be suffered by the Company in the event that this Agreement is breached. Accordingly, the Company will be entitled to monetary damages only as a remedy for any such breach with proof of actual damages. Investor further agrees to waive, and to use its reasonable efforts to cause its Representatives to waive, any requirement for the securing or posting of any bond in connection with any such remedy. Any such equitable remedy shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedy for a breach of this Agreement, but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself. The original text stated monetary damages would be inadequate, and the Company would be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief. The changed text says monetary damages are adequate and the company is entitled to monetary damages only. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, indicating this contradiction is happening in the same location due to edits.

perturbation.original_text: Each party consents to the jurisdiction of the state or federal courts in Cook County, Illinois, which will be the sole venue for resolution of all disputes related to this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party consents to the jurisdiction of the state or federal courts in Cook County, Illinois, or any venue of the Investor's choosing, which will be the venue for resolution of all disputes related to this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The addition of "or any venue of the Investor's choosing" to Section 18 contradicts the original clause establishing Cook County, Illinois as the sole venue. Now there is conflicting information regarding which is the venue of jurisdiction if any disputes arise. This change introduces in-text contradiction and legal uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Governing Law; Venue; Waiver of Jury Trial . This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Illinois, without reference to its conflicts of law principles. Each party consents to the jurisdiction of the state or federal courts in Cook County, Illinois, or any venue of the Investor's choosing, which will be the venue for resolution of all disputes related to this Agreement. THE PARTIES HERETO WAIVE THE RIGHT TO TRIAL BY JURY IN CONNECTION WITH ANY MATTER ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies Cook County, Illinois, as the sole venue for dispute resolution. The changed text adds "or any venue of the Investor's choosing," which directly contradicts the 'sole venue' provision. The contradicted text includes this new contradictory clause. This creates a strong in-text contradiction because there are now two conflicting options for venue, creating uncertainty.
